programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: The Glass House

The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: In the season finale of All Stars 3, the contestants’ hard work throughout the competition is put to the ultimate test. With tensions in the Middle East reaching a boiling point, the CIA assigns the All-Stars an executive protection mission for a key negotiator. However, before the team can deploy, escalating terrorist activity dramatically raises the threat level. Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. When they're caught on the X with no clear way out, there's only one option left—eliminate the threat. Who will survive the mission? And who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The stakes continue to climb as Green Light Sights rewards one top shooter with their very own custom weapon—proof that precision pays off. But there's no time to celebrate. Bear Arms ups the ante by issuing defense vests to every contestant, with one hard rule: once it’s on, it stays on. From grueling mission briefings to body armor plank challenges that push endurance to the brink, the weight—literally and mentally—never lets up. Still armored, the team reports to Ken Shamrock for another brutal dose of Lion’s Den physical punishment. Just when they think they’ve caught a break, Compliant Technologies’ infamous glove makes a shocking return to torment a fresh round of contestants. And as the day winds down, Don introduces the team to his personal “Flights” challenge—an unforgiving test no one is excited to take on. It all ends with a sobering CIA reminder: in the field, your backstory might just save your life—or end it.

programme.title: Magic of Zion
programme.desc: Experience the magnificent Zion National Park in its autumn splendor! Brilliant autumn colors combine with the warm red tones of Zion's dramatic cliffs to create a visual feast like no other in" Magic of Zion". Also included is rare footage of the endangered American Condor, the largest flying land bird in North America. Watch as a wild parent Condor feeds and nurtures its fledgling on the cliffs of Zion, an awe inspiring sight since there used to be only 50 condors in existence. Runtime 82 minutes.

programme.title: The Pacific Coast
programme.desc: Experience the natural beauty of the Pacific Coast from Washington State to Southern California. See breathtaking video of spectacular sunsets and iconic locations along the Big Sur coast. The photography and cinematography of Olof and Elizabeth Carmel are paired with relaxing music to provide an exquisite "ambient art" experience for TV and mobile devices.

programme.title: Journey Through the Dolomites
programme.desc: Explore the jagged, vertical world of the Italian Alps. Watch the sun set over limestone peaks and emerald meadows, casting a warm glow over one of the most unique and beautiful mountain ranges on earth.

programme.title: Sequoia & Kings Canyon National Parks
programme.desc: Step into a world of ancient giants. This cinematic journey travels deep into the heart of the southern Sierra Nevada, where the largest trees on Earth stand as silent sentinels of time. Witness the filtered golden light of the 'Giant Forest,' the rugged granite canyons of the Kings River, and the quiet, mist-filled meadows that lie in the shadow of these wooden titans. An immersive experience designed to bring the scale and serenity of the High Sierra's most majestic groves into your home.

programme.title: Arches & Canyonlands
programme.desc: The sublime landscape of Arches and Canyonlands area of Utah is the star in this 90 minute film, which showcases awe-inspiring natural arches, dramatic canyon vista sunrises & sunsets, and flights through arches and over the Colorado River canyon. The spectacular cinematography is accompanied by beautiful Native American flute music. Note: All Drone footage was filmed outside of National and State Park boundaries.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 222: Logan Chamberlain Wins Again + Open #13 Recap This week on Around The ACL, Jake, Anthony, and Meesh recap all the action from Open #13, including another impressive Singles victory from Logan Chamberlain and a breakthrough Doubles title for Richard Nyberg and Justin Everett. With the Open season winding down, the crew discusses the biggest performances, key storylines, and what these results could mean moving forward. The show also features a special interview with Logan Chamberlain following his Singles championship run. Logan joins the show to talk about his season, his recent success, and what has allowed him to remain one of the most dangerous players in the sport. Plus, we recap the Women's, Seniors, and Juniors divisions, highlighting championship performances from Charity Shirley, Jamie Guffey and Desirrae McCoy, Joanne Martin, Mike Miller, Bryce Macdonald, Carter Gonzales, and Keegan Leonard. Join us as we break down Open #13, catch up with one of the hottest players in cornhole, and look ahead to the next chapter of the ACL season.

programme.title: S3E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The GoPro production crew journeys to the Marum Crater on Ambrym Island in Vanuatu to join adventurer photographers Geoff Mackley and Bradley Ambrose, the first people to stand at the edge of a boiling lava lake and witness the raw lifeblood of our planet. The adventure continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, who has dedicated her life and research to protecting the most intelligent predator in the ocean, the orca. She swims alongside wild orcas and champions modern solutions to free them from captivity. Experience never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at its most powerful.

programme.title: S3E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The journey continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, a marine pioneer devoted to protecting the ocean’s most intelligent predator, the orca. She swims with wild orcas and leads the charge for innovative solutions to end captivity. Witness never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, paired with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at their most inspiring. In the wide-open skies and sweeping valleys of the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, more than 600 Wild American Mustangs roam free. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini reveals the importance of preserving this symbol of American heritage while passing its legacy to his children. As night falls, Tokyo becomes an electrifying playground for those who crave speed and style. The city’s custom vehicle culture bursts to life, introducing unforgettable characters and rides unlike anything you have seen before. Lamborghinis, Hayabusas, RWB Porsches, and Kaido Racers create a visual feast on the streets of Tokyo after dark.

programme.title: S3E3 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of four incredible adventures and discover how they came to life. At the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, over 600 Wild American Mustangs roam the sweeping valleys and open skies. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini shares the passion and dedication it takes to preserve this living symbol of American heritage. In Tokyo, the crew captures the city’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture thrives. From Lamborghinis to RWB Porsches, Hayabusas to Kaido Racers, every frame is a visual thrill. In the icy waters of Greenland’s Disko Bay, the team follows professional ice climbers Klemen Premrl and Aljaz Anderle as they take on a fragile and unpredictable iceberg, facing nature’s challenges and learning powerful lessons along the way. The journey closes with Dr. Ingrid Visser’s mission to protect the orca. Viewers are treated to never-before-seen footage from a GoPro mounted to a wild orca’s dorsal fin along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is an unmissable look at the grit, passion, and artistry behind creating these extraordinary stories.

programme.title: S3E4 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Go further behind the scenes as the crew captures Tokyo’s transformation after dark into a high-octane playground where custom car culture reigns supreme. They search for the elusive Shinichi Moroboshi, a legendary figure in Japan’s supercar scene and well-known Lamborghini enthusiast. The adventure continues in the snow with GoPro athletes John Jackson and Chris Benchetler on a quest for the perfect ride. From the bustling streets of Tokyo to the serene landscapes of Hakuba and the untouched powder fields of Hokkaido, the crew follows every moment of their journey. Along the way, you will see how these breathtaking stories were crafted, from scouting locations to capturing the raw energy and beauty of each scene. This is your all-access pass to the artistry, adrenaline, and dedication that make these adventures unforgettable.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.
